What can SheetOS AI do?

\r\n
\r\n
\r\n
Smart Formatter\r\n

Say \"make this professional\" and get instant clean formatting, spacing, fonts, colors,\r\n alignment

\r\n
\r\n
\r\n
\r\n
Formula Generator\r\n

Describe what you need in plain English — get VLOOKUP, SUMIF, INDEX/MATCH, any formula

\r\n
\r\n
\r\n
\r\n
Report Automation\r\n

Generate monthly sales, financial, or performance reports with charts in one click

\r\n
\r\n
\r\n
\r\n
Tables & Charts\r\n

Create formatted tables, column/bar/line/pie charts, dashboards

\r\n
\r\n
\r\n
\r\n
Sort & Filter\r\n

Sort by any column, apply AutoFilter, multi-column sorting

\r\n
\r\n
\r\n
\r\n
Validation\r\n

Dropdown lists, number constraints, date limits, error alerts

\r\n
\r\n
\r\n
\r\n
Conditional Formatting\r\n

Color scales, data bars, icon sets, highlight rules

\r\n
\r\n
\r\n
\r\n
Data Cleanup\r\n

Remove duplicates, trim spaces, fix formats, standardize case

\r\n
\r\n
\r\n
\r\n
Freeze & Protect\r\n

Freeze header rows, protect sheets with custom permissions

\r\n
\r\n
\r\n
\r\n
Worksheets\r\n

Add, rename, delete, copy sheets, change tab colors

\r\n
\r\n
\r\n
\r\n
Templates\r\n

Budget trackers, invoices, employee lists, project trackers, grade books

\r\n
\r\n
\r\n
\r\n

Just describe what you need in plain English — SheetOS handles the rest.

Connection Blocked
\r\n                
\r\n                    Windows is preventing the Add-in from connecting to the local server.\r\n                
\r\n\r\n                \r\n                    Quick Fix:\r\n                    
    \r\n                        
  1. Open PowerShell as Admin
    2. \r\n                        
  2. Paste and run this:
    3. \r\n                    
\r\n                    \r\n                        npx office-addin-dev-settings loopback --add  5552d631-21e7-4926-b20c-84c6c296efd5\r\n                    \r\n                
\r\n\r\n                \r\n                    Open Debug & Trust Cert\r\n                \r\n\r\n                \r\n            \r\n        \r\n    
\r\n\r\n    \r\n\r\n    \r\n    <" + "script>\r\n        setTimeout(function () {\r\n            var app = document.getElementById(\"app-body\");\r\n            var fb = document.getElementById(\"debug-fallback\");\r\n            if ((!app || app.style.display === \"none\") && fb) {\r\n                fb.style.display = \"block\";\r\n            }\r\n        }, 30000); // 30 seconds timeout before red box\r\n    <" + "/script>\r\n\r\n\r\n";
